title: Immersive Tips
description: Adds rich-text tips to the loading screen and items, crowdsourced and updated automatically.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f92d02bca9ddfcc3a3bf279f2a62768e04ea3e7_0.webp)

*Immersive Tips* is an accessibility mod for Minecraft that seeks to make the game easier for new players through a crowdsourced tips system. When your game starts up, the latest advice is pulled from GitHub from knowledgeable modded players making suggestions with the accompanying [Discord bot](https://discord.gg/WvDQYaKtS5)--all without needing to update the mod!

Sometimes, all that's needed to make modpacks more accessible is a little reminder at startup, or a little blurb of text explaining an item. This mod adds two kinds of tips, both with their own systems: loading tips, shown on world creation and pause menu screens, and item tooltips, shown when you hover over that item. 

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4ef84853d756761fede647b75aa15b4df04d6ef.png)

Both of these types of tips are pulled in from [GitHub](https://github.com/txnimc/ImmersiveTips/blob/main/tooltips.json) and are updated periodically by reviewers. 

Users can suggest new messages using the [Immersive Tips Discord Bot](https://discord.gg/WvDQYaKtS5). These suggestions are sent to a queue, and either approved, edited, or denied by reviewers to filter for quality.

![demo2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc3755a59a38eaeb32595abb53b9123af588bc5_0.webp)

If you'd like to suggest tips to help guide players through your mods, or through other mods, you can join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/WvDQYaKtS5) to help out.

This mod replaces [Tips by DarkhaxDev](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tips) and includes full support for this legacy tip format, as well as including the default pool of tips from the old mod (though this can be disabled)
